{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/34056000?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brettgervasoni/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brettgervasoni/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brettgervasoni/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brettgervasoni/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/brettgervasoni", "id": 34056000, "login": "brettgervasoni", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjM0MDU2MDAw", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brettgervasoni/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brettgervasoni/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brettgervasoni/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brettgervasoni/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brettgervasoni/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/brettgervasoni", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-42151", "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-312", "name": "Cleartext Storage of Sensitive Information"}], "description": "### Impact

Users who use Azure AD remote write with OAuth authentication are impacted.

The `client_secret` field in the Azure AD remote write OAuth configuration (`storage/remote/azuread`) was typed as `string` instead of `Secret`. Prometheus redacts fields of type `Secret` when serving the configuration via the `/-/config` HTTP API endpoint. Because the field was a plain string, the Azure OAuth client secret was exposed in plaintext to any user or process with access to that endpoint.

### Patches

The problem has been patched by changing `ClientSecret` in `OAuthConfig` to `Secret`. Users should upgrade to 3.11.3 or 3.5.3 LTS.

### Workarounds

Users  who can not upgrade can switch to Managed Identity or Workload Identity authentication for Azure AD remote write, which do not involve a client secret.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00326, "percentile": 0.24512}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-wg65-39gg-5wfj", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-05T19:33:47Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wg65-39gg-5wfj", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-wg65-39gg-5wfj"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42151"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-04T19:16:04Z", "published_at": "2026-05-05T19:33:47Z", "references": ["https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/security/advisories/GHSA-wg65-39gg-5wfj", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42151", "https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/pull/18587", "https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/pull/18590", "https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/releases/tag/v3.11.3", "https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/releases/tag/v3.5.3", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wg65-39gg-5wfj"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/prometheus/prometheus/security-advisories/GHSA-wg65-39gg-5wfj", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus", "summary": "Prometheus Azure AD remote write OAuth client secret exposed via config API", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-05T19:33:48Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-wg65-39gg-5wfj", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.311.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/prometheus/prometheus"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.45.2, < 0.311.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Prometheus Azure AD remote write OAuth client secret exposed via config API
